description_long: This house is a modern residential structure set within a spacious, landscaped plot featuring a mix of open lawns, tree-lined boundaries, and garden areas. The main building has a rectangular footprint with a flat roof and large windows, complemented by a secondary structure that appears to be a shed or garage. The property includes a driveway leading to the house, a swimming pool, and a patio area with outdoor seating. The landscaping is carefully organized, with rows of trees providing privacy and visual interest along the perimeter. The house exterior is finished in a combination of light-colored stone or concrete and wood accents, giving it a contemporary yet natural appearance. The overall layout emphasizes open space, outdoor living, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with large windows, wood and stone finishes, set in a landscaped plot with a pool, patio, and tree-lined boundaries.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, patio, pool, and a clear view of the landscaped garden and driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, secondary structure, and the arrangement of trees along the property edge.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, additional garden space, and the back facade of the house with large windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the secondary structure, garden plots, and the tree-lined boundary at the rear.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, wide steps, and a minimalist door flanked by large windows and wood accents.
